docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASHTON, TRAVIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER CONTINUED TO APR-12-2019 AT 1:30 PM. THE COURT ORDERED MR. ASHTON TO CONTACT THE MANAGEMENT COMPANY FOR THE RETURN OF HIS PERSONAL BELONGINGS. PARTIES TO REPORT BACK TO COURT ON APRIL 12, 2019. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF TRAVIS ASHTON WITH WITNESS DEBRA BENEDICT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RICKY BROWN. THE COURT CALLED AND LEFT A MESSAGE WITH THE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY (TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOD HOUSING CORPORATION AT DORE) TO ALLOW MR. ASHTON TO RETRIEVE HIS PERSONAL BELONGINGS FROM STORAGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II,, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ASHTON, TRAVIS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, RICKY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED FEB-21-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, RICKY
